hero.headline: Implementation specialist who bridges business and technology
hero.description: 5+ years delivering seamless enterprise onboardings with 20 successful SaaS rollouts across UK, US, and Middle East. Expert at data migration, stakeholder coordination, and platform configuration. Proven track record of turning complex business requirements into streamlined implementations while driving process improvements and automation.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations with full lifecycle ownership — requirements gathering, data migration, platform configuration, UAT coordination, and post-go-live support across UK, US, and Middle East markets.
Collaborated extensively with cross-functional teams (sales, engineering, product, support) and external stakeholders to ensure seamless onboarding experiences and smooth system integrations.
Engineered custom SaaS configurations and data migration processes for each client implementation, ensuring platform adoption and operational efficiency post-deployment.
Developed comprehensive documentation frameworks and standardized implementation processes — reducing onboarding complexity and enabling scalable delivery across multiple concurrent projects.

highlights.label: Process Innovation
highlights.text: Designed a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort estimation models — enabling accurate project scoping, automated timeline calculations, and streamlined requirements documentation.

highlights.label: Data Migration Expertise
highlights.text: Successfully migrated complex enterprise datasets across 20+ implementations, handling diverse data formats and legacy system integrations while maintaining data integrity and minimizing business disruption.

highlights.label: Stakeholder Management
highlights.text: Served as primary point of contact for executive and operational stakeholders during implementations — facilitating workshops, managing project communications, and ensuring alignment across internal and external teams.

highlights.label: Platform Expertise Development
highlights.text: Became subject matter expert on enterprise CMMS platform within first quarter, enabling faster onboardings and serving as go-to resource for complex configuration challenges across the implementation team.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed complex data migration and catalog integration projects for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — ensuring data accuracy and operational continuity during system transitions.
Developed automated prioritization frameworks using forecasting data, inventory metrics, and user analytics — delivering $230K monthly operational savings through improved resource allocation.
Collaborated with cross-functional support teams to identify and resolve process gaps, reducing invalid case assignments by ~50 per day through standardized workflows and clear documentation.
Served as subject matter expert for catalog data processes, providing guidance and knowledge transfer to support seamless operations across multiple product lines.
